name: Déjà Vu
description: Dual fader utility with voltage source behavior, attenuator, attenuverter, crossfader, preamp gain up to 10x, cascading outputs, and CV or audio processing in 4HP.

controls.name: FADER
controls.description: Sets the channel level or crossfade position depending on mode.

controls.name: FADER MODE
controls.description: Switches between attenuverter, attenuator, and crossfader behavior.

controls.name: FADER GAIN
controls.description: Sets the gain stage for the fader path.

controls.name: Cascading output jumper
controls.description: Routes channel A into channel B when the output path is left unpatched.

inputs.name: FADER A
inputs.description: Main fader input for channel A. Normalled to a voltage source when unpatched.

inputs.name: ADD A
inputs.description: Auxiliary input summed after the fader path on channel A.

inputs.name: FADER B
inputs.description: Main fader input for channel B. Normalled to a voltage source when unpatched.

inputs.name: ADD B
inputs.description: Auxiliary input summed after the fader path on channel B.

outputs.name: OUT A
outputs.description: Channel A output with polarity and voltage indication.

outputs.name: OUT B
outputs.description: Channel B output, cascaded from A when the rear jumper is set and OUT A is left unused.

behaviors.name: Voltage source mode
behaviors.description: The fader becomes a static voltage source instead of a level control, so each channel can act as an offset or bias generator.

behaviors.name: Three-way fader behavior
behaviors.description: The same channel can act as an attenuverter, attenuator, or crossfader between FADER and ADD, which keeps the panel useful for both audio and CV.

behaviors.name: Preamp gain
behaviors.description: The channel can boost incoming audio up to 10x, making it usable as a line-level preamp as well as a utility attenuator.

behaviors.name: Cascade mixer
behaviors.description: Channel A mixes into channel B when the cascading jumper is enabled, effectively turning the pair into a 4-input mixer.

behaviors.name: CV or audio utility
behaviors.trigger: patch either audio or control voltages
behaviors.description: The module processes both CV and audio cleanly, so it works as a bias box, crossfade pair, gain stage, or small mixer.

patchIdeas.name: Voltage offset pair
patchIdeas.patch: Leave both FADER inputs open · set each fader to different positions · use the two channels as offset sources for pitch or filter modulation · a tiny analog bias box with hands-on control.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Déjà Vu:
* FADER MODE: attenuator
* FADER GAIN: 1x

LFO:
Filter:
Output:

- LFO (Out) >> Déjà Vu (ADD A)
- Déjà Vu (OUT A) >> Filter (Cutoff)
- Déjà Vu (OUT B) >> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Crossfade macro
patchIdeas.patch: Use channel A as a crossfader between two modulation sources · feed the result into channel B for fine trimming · one fader performs the macro move while the second sets the final range.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Déjà Vu:
* FADER MODE: crossfader
* FADER GAIN: 1x

LFO:
Envelope:
Output:

- LFO (Out) >> Déjà Vu (FADER A)
- Envelope (Out) >> Déjà Vu (ADD A)
- Déjà Vu (OUT A) >> Déjà Vu (FADER B)
- Déjà Vu (OUT B) >> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Stereo line preamp
patchIdeas.patch: Use the 10x gain setting to lift line-level or quiet synth sources into modular level · channel A and B handle left and right paths separately · useful before an effect return or mixer insert.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Déjà Vu:
* FADER MODE: attenuator
* FADER GAIN: 10x

Source L:
Source R:
Output:

- Source L (Out) -> Déjà Vu (FADER A)
- Source R (Out) -> Déjà Vu (FADER B)
- Déjà Vu (OUT A) -> Output (L)
- Déjà Vu (OUT B) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Cascade mixer
patchIdeas.patch: Patch several sources into A and B, leave OUT A unpatched, and let the cascade jumper fold both channels into a small mixer. The module turns into a compact two-stage mix and trim block.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Déjà Vu:
* FADER MODE: attenuator
* Cascading output jumper: on

Source 1:
Source 2:
Output:

- Source 1 (Out) -> Déjà Vu (FADER A)
- Source 2 (Out) -> Déjà Vu (FADER B)
- Déjà Vu (OUT B) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Bias and clip
patchIdeas.patch: Bias a hot audio signal with the fader source mode and push it into an ADD input from another oscillator or envelope · the result is a simple saturating utility stage with a very direct feel.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Déjà Vu:
* FADER MODE: attenuverter
* FADER GAIN: 2x

VCO:
Envelope:
Output:

- VCO (Out) -> Déjà Vu (FADER A)
- Envelope (Out) >> Déjà Vu (ADD A)
- Déjà Vu (OUT A) -> Output (In)
